# Context

These are docs generated by Claude.

> I am a lazy lazy man, and Claude likes docs :)

## Getting Started Guides

### Terminal & Editor

#### [Tmux Getting Started Guide](./TMUX-GUIDE.md)
Learn everything you need to know about the tmux configuration, from basic concepts to advanced workflows. Covers sessions, windows, panes, keybindings, copy mode, and mouse support.

**Perfect for**: Complete beginners to tmux, or anyone wanting to learn this specific configuration's setup (Space prefix key, plugins, workflows).

#### [Neovim Getting Started Guide](./NEOVIM-GUIDE.md)
A complete reference for using neovim, starting from absolute basics to advanced LSP features. Includes comprehensive keybinding tables, modal editing concepts, and all custom configuration features.

**Perfect for**: Anyone new to vim/neovim, or developers wanting to master this specific configuration (LSP features, Telescope, custom keybindings, language support).

### CLI Tools & Development

#### [sysdsqr CLI Usage Guide](./SYSDSQR-USAGE.md)
Complete usage guide for the `sysdsqr` CLI tool. Covers local development, remote usage via GitHub, installation methods, troubleshooting, and integration patterns.

**Perfect for**: Developers working on or using `sysdsqr`, understanding Nix flake app patterns, troubleshooting cache issues.

#### [Essential Nix Flake Commands](./NIX-COMMANDS.md)
Practical reference for Nix flake commands you'll actually use. Covers cache management, garbage collection, building, running, debugging, and system management.

**Perfect for**: Managing this Nix configuration, troubleshooting flake cache issues, cleaning up disk space, debugging builds.

### Infrastructure & Services

#### [Proxmox API Quick Start](./PROXMOX-API.md)
Compact guide for integrating with Proxmox VE API. Covers authentication (API tokens), essential endpoints, permission levels, health checks, and security best practices.

**Perfect for**: Building automation tools, monitoring Proxmox clusters, integrating with `sysdsqr` CLI.

#### [CockroachDB Setup Guide](./COCKROACHDB-SETUP.md)
Complete setup guide for CockroachDB in NixOS using the custom module. Covers single-node and cluster modes, certificate generation, secure/insecure modes, and common operations.

**Perfect for**: Setting up CockroachDB in your homelab, understanding the NixOS module, certificate management, cluster configuration.
